sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94348" key="siteuwne/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῑτ-ευωνέω</orth>, <sense id="n94348.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">buy corn and sell it cheap</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ἀρχ.Δελτ</foreign>.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0543.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:148" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.148</biblScope> </bibl> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Beroea</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
